title: crataegus oxyacantha var. brevispina
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha var. brevispina, also known as the hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects, making it beneficial for heart health and lowering blood pressure. The health benefits of Crataegus oxyacantha var. brevispina include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving blood lipid profiles, and enhancing cardiac function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, capsules, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to support cardiovascular well-being.
